<!-- MCPLEXER:HARNESS-SYNC:BEGIN v1 (opencode) -->

using-mcplexer skill (v1) installed.

Full skill body: ~/.config/opencode/skills/using-mcplexer/SKILL.md (materialized from registry v1).

Use the 4 top-level tools: mcpx__search_tools + mcpx__execute_code (batch everything), secret__prompt / secret__list_refs.
Fetch deeper playbooks via the skill registry on demand.

## Memory — mcplexer is the single source of truth

Do NOT use your native memory system. All persistent memory MUST be saved via memory.save({...}) inside mcpx__execute_code.
Read mcplexer memory first: memory.recall({query}) or memory.list({}) inside mcpx__execute_code.
mcplexer memory is cross-harness, cross-machine, and persists across all sessions.

<!-- MCPLEXER:HARNESS-SYNC:END -->
